# Axon — Full Documentation for LLMs

> Open-source, self-hosted AI command center.
> Website: https://useaxon.dev
> GitHub: https://github.com/brandonkorous/axon
> License: AGPL-3.0

---

## Overview

Axon is an AI platform that remembers, listens, and thinks with you. It coordinates specialist advisors around your actual life and work — remembering what matters, delegating to the right expert, and getting smarter over time.

Unlike cloud-dependent AI tools, Axon runs entirely on your own infrastructure. Your data never leaves your servers.

---

## Core Features

### Neural Memory Trees

Axon stores knowledge as Obsidian-compatible markdown files in local vaults. The memory system includes:

- **Vaults**: Organized memory storage per advisor, stored as local markdown files
- **Recall**: Confidence-scored retrieval of relevant memories during conversations
- **Learning**: Active extraction of new knowledge from conversations
- **Confidence Decay**: Memories naturally decay over time unless reinforced
- **Consolidation**: Automatic merging and summarization of related memories
- **CLI Commands**: Manage memory trees via command line

### Voice-First Interaction

Talk, don't type. Axon's voice system includes:

- **Speech-to-Text**: Whisper handles transcription
- **Text-to-Speech**: Piper handles voice synthesis
- **Per-Advisor Voices**: Each specialist advisor can have their own voice
- **Natural Conversation**: Designed for fluid, natural interaction patterns

### Specialist Advisors

Organization templates give you curated advisor teams:

- **Startup Board**: Business strategy, technical architecture, marketing, legal
- **Family Organizer**: Scheduling, meal planning, budgeting, education
- **Career Coaches**: Resume review, interview prep, skill development
- Each advisor has their own persona, vault, and expertise
- Axon routes requests to the right specialist based on context

### Local LLM Support

Zero cloud dependency:

- Run entirely on your hardware via Ollama
- No API keys required for basic operation
- Optionally connect to Claude, GPT, or other cloud providers for reasoning
- Local inference handles memory operations (recall, learning, consolidation)

### Platform Integrations

Axon advisors plug directly into the tools your team already uses:

- **Slack**: Summon advisors in any channel. Get proactive insights, task updates, and decision summaries without leaving your workspace.
- **Microsoft Teams**: Bring AI advisors into your Teams channels. Surface decisions, action items, and briefings where your organization already collaborates.
- **Zoom**: AI advisors join your meetings as silent participants. Get real-time analysis, meeting summaries, and follow-up action items automatically.
- **Discord**: Deploy advisors to your Discord server. Community managers and dev teams get AI-powered insights right in their existing channels.

All integrations run on your infrastructure. Your conversations never leave your network.

---

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

- Docker and Docker Compose
- 8 GB+ RAM (16 GB recommended for local LLMs)
- Ollama (optional, for local inference)

### Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/brandonkorous/axon.git
cd axon
cp .env.example .env
docker compose up -d
```

Then visit http://localhost:3000.

### Configuration

| Variable | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| DEFAULT_MODEL | anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514 | LLM provider and model |
| ANTHROPIC_API_KEY | (none) | Required for Claude models |
| OLLAMA_BASE_URL | http://ollama:11434 | Local LLM endpoint |
| DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY | (generate with Fernet) | Encrypts OAuth tokens |

---

## Architecture

- **Axon Agent**: Central orchestrator that routes requests to specialist advisors
- **Memory Layer**: Local LLM (Ollama) handles recall, learning, and consolidation
- **Advisor SDK**: Build custom specialist advisors with their own personas and vaults
- **REST & WebSocket API**: Full API for programmatic access
- **Storage**: Local filesystem with Obsidian-compatible markdown
- **Integrations**: Slack, Teams, Zoom, Discord connectors run within your infrastructure

---

## API

### REST Endpoints

The Axon backend exposes REST endpoints for managing advisors, memory vaults, conversations, and organization templates.

### WebSocket

Real-time streaming for conversations and voice interaction.

### Advisor SDK

Build custom specialist advisors with:

- Custom personas and system prompts
- Dedicated memory vaults
- Specialized tool access
- Per-advisor voice configuration

---

## Release History

- **v0.4.0** (March 2026): Organization templates, multi-advisor routing, Discord bot integration
- **v0.3.0** (February 2026): Voice-first interaction, Whisper + Piper integration
- **v0.2.0** (January 2026): Neural memory trees v2, confidence decay, consolidation
- **v0.1.0** (December 2025): Initial release, basic chat, single advisor, markdown memory

---
